access_token.description: Senseforce API access token, sent as a Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <access_token>). Never logged.

backend_url.description: Your Senseforce backend base URL (e.g. https://yourtenant.senseforce.io). No default: a Senseforce backend must be named explicitly, matching legacy's required config_backend_url.

dataset_id.description: The Senseforce dataset ID to read records from; substituted into /api/v1/datasets/<dataset_id>/records.
